known_issues: visit-continuation API tests: Routes use createClient() with cookies (server.ts), but API tests send Authorization header. Pre-existing design mismatch — needs route middleware to accept Bearer tokens or tests must use browser login. Outside WS1 fixture scope.

admin-settings tests are flaky under resource pressure (dev server compilation during tests). Pass reliably when run with adequate resources.
